ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the fatality record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fatality data was collected */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the state */,
  "rate_of_fatalities" REAL /* Rate of fatalities in the state */,
  "state_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state based on fatalities */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Common cause of fatalities */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the fatalities occurred */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries_illnesses" (
  "injury_illness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury/illness record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the injury/illness record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the injury/illness data was collected */,
  "number_of_injuries_illnesses" INTEGER /* Number of injuries and illnesses in the state */,
  "rate_of_injuries_illnesses" REAL /* Rate of injuries and illnesses in the state */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "illness_type" TEXT /* Type of illness */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the injuries/illnesses occurred */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the affected individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the affected individuals */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_illness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_illnesses_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the penalty record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the penalty data was collected */,
  "average_penalty" REAL /* Average penalty amount */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the state based on penalties */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the penalties were imposed */,
  "penalty_amount_total" REAL /* Total penalty amount for the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the inspector record belongs to */,
  "number_of_inspections" INTEGER /* Number of inspections */,
  "years_to_inspect_each_workplace_once" INTEGER /* Years to inspect each workplace once */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_email" TEXT /* Email of the inspector */,
  "inspector_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "inspector_address" TEXT /* Address of the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the program record belongs to */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (State or Federal) */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
